roleTitle: Senior Java Backend Developer & Software Architect
profileParagraphs: Joel is a senior Java backend developer and software architect with a master's degree in computer science from KTH and more than 14 years of experience in software development. He has deep experience with Java, Spring Boot, SQL, PostgreSQL, API design, microservices and integration-heavy distributed systems.

He has delivered business-critical backend services in banking and payments, e-health, education, culture and startup environments. His work includes microservice architecture, bank and merchant integrations, data modeling, REST APIs, CI/CD, logging, quality practices and systems with high requirements for security, traceability, uptime and performance.

Joel is an analytical problem solver with strong pedagogical skills. He quickly understands complex flows, internal organizations and technical stacks, and contributes with architecture, implementation, code review, debugging and knowledge sharing across teams.

selectedEvidence.title: Backend Developer - Bankgirot
selectedEvidence.subtitle: Jan 2012 - Dec 2016 - Stockholm
selectedEvidence.summary: Backend developer in the team that built Swish, Sweden's largest mobile payment solution. Led the introduction of B2B payments in a microservice architecture and worked with integrations for banks, merchants and Swish support, with high requirements for security, traceability, test coverage, uptime and performance.

selectedEvidence.title: Backend Developer and Architect - We-U-Me AB
selectedEvidence.subtitle: Oct 2021 - present
selectedEvidence.summary: Contributed from idea and pre-study through MVP and continued development for a personal-assistance startup. Worked with solution proposals, software architecture, database structure, backend and frontend code, PaaS, CI/CD, logging and quality governance.

selectedEvidence.title: Fullstack Developer - Riksforbundet FUB
selectedEvidence.subtitle: Jan 2025 - Jan 2026
selectedEvidence.summary: Built DigiVi, a web application for users with disabilities. Created the data model, Java/Spring Boot/PostgreSQL backend and APIs with interactive Swagger documentation, supporting React interfaces for end users, administrators and super administrators.

selectedEvidence.title: Architect and Fullstack Developer - Teknik i Vast
selectedEvidence.subtitle: Jun 2019 - Jan 2025
selectedEvidence.summary: Created the architecture for Techformance, an interactive theater application with multiple React interfaces, Java/Spring Boot backend, WebSockets and PostgreSQL. The work included long-term architecture and development for an application used by children and young people.

projects.title: Backend Developer - Bankgirot
projects.subtitle: Jan 2012 - Dec 2016 - Stockholm
projects.summary: Joel worked as a backend developer in the team behind Swish. He led the work to introduce B2B payments in a microservice architecture and integrated the solution with banks, merchants and Swish support. The assignment included on-call responsibility and production troubleshooting in an environment with high requirements for security, traceability and test coverage.

projects.title: Backend Developer and Architect - We-U-Me AB
projects.subtitle: Oct 2021 - present
projects.summary: Joel has been part of the work from idea and pre-study through MVP and continued development for a startup in personal assistance. He has contributed solution proposals, software architecture, database structure, backend code, frontend code and UX design, and supported junior colleagues and Scrum Master responsibilities when needed.

projects.title: Fullstack Developer - Riksforbundet FUB
projects.subtitle: Jan 2025 - Jan 2026
projects.summary: For DigiVi, Joel created the data model, backend and APIs for a web application that helps users with disabilities find friends and partners and learn about relationships. The backend in Java, PostgreSQL and Spring Boot supports React interfaces for several user roles, with interactive API documentation in Swagger.

projects.title: Architect and Fullstack Developer - Teknik i Vast
projects.subtitle: Jun 2019 - Jan 2025
projects.summary: Joel created the architecture for Techformance, an interactive theater application where participants influence what happens on stage. The application used React for multiple interfaces and Java/Spring Boot for the backend, with WebSockets and PostgreSQL for interactive flows.

projects.title: Fullstack Developer - Dit-i-tid
projects.subtitle: Jan 2020 - Dec 2024
projects.summary: Joel wrote most of the code for Dit-i-tid, a reminder service focused on cognitive disabilities. The service was built with Java, Spring Boot and Angular/TypeScript/JavaScript and hosted on AWS, with REST APIs, JWT, Liquibase and accessibility considerations.

projects.title: Fullstack Developer - SBAB
projects.subtitle: Apr 2019 - Dec 2023
projects.summary: Together with SBAB and Make Equal, Joel built Respekttrappan, a Trello-like web application for workplace exercises in equal treatment and anti-discrimination. He worked with backend and frontend development and helped secure a high level of accessibility in the web application.

projects.title: AI-assisted Development Lead - ViewMe
projects.subtitle: Jan 2026 - Apr 2026
projects.summary: Joel led an initiative to introduce AI-supported development with Cursor and related tools. The work covered boilerplate generation for DTOs, mappers and controllers, refactoring, JUnit test generation, debugging, legacy-code documentation, SQL generation, database optimization, API contracts and best-practice analysis.

skillLevels.skills: Java, Java 8, backend development, microservice architecture, prototyping and WCAG-aware development.
Spring Boot, Spring, SQL, PostgreSQL, data modeling, REST API, Swagger, WebSockets, Hibernate, Liquibase, Git, integrations, CI/CD, accessibility testing and accessible code.
Docker, Docker Compose, Jenkins, OpenShift, AWS, Heroku, CleverCloud, IBM MQ, JWT, MapStruct, JHipster, Scrum Master support, React.js, TypeScript, Angular and Material UI.
Cursor AI, AI-supported development, AI development tools, Atlassian Rovo AI, C#, Xamarin Android/iOS, Android SDK, .NET and JIRA plugin development.

certifications: Oracle Java SE 8 Programmer certification, 2012. Master in Computer Science and Teaching, Royal Institute of Technology (KTH), Stockholm, 2007-2012.
